nasb.text: So Abram went up from Egypt to the Negev, he and his wife and all that belonged to him, and Lot with him.

esv.text: So Abram went up from Egypt, he and his wife and all that he had, and Lot with him, into the Negeb.

cnv.text: 亞伯蘭帶著妻子和所有的一切，以及羅得，一同從埃及上到南地去。

ccb.text: 亚伯兰带着妻子、侄儿罗得和所有的一切离开埃及去南地。

csbs.text: 亚伯兰带着妻子和一切属于他的，从埃及上南地去；罗得也随着他。
